pi_items.source: task.json line 5 description mentions 'HR_Interview_Confidential'; task.json line 18 metadata; export_result.sh line 26 greps logs for this room name; verifier.py line 32 uses as default room name; consistent across all references
task.json line 5 description specifies host should join 'as Interviewer'; task.json line 19 metadata; this is the display name for the host participant

task.json line 5 description specifies guest should join 'as Jane_Doe_Candidate'; task.json line 20 metadata; verifier.py line 33 uses as default guest name; verifier.py line 87 includes in VLM verification prompt; verifier.py line 97 checks for guest name visibility
task.json line 21 metadata includes 'guest_name_alt': 'Jane'; NOT found in task description or any executable code; no code path uses this value

task.json line 5 description mentions 'http://localhost:8080'; task.json line 22 metadata; setup_task.sh line 12 uses in wait_for_http check; setup_task.sh line 25 passes to restart_firefox; task_utils.sh line 4 sets default JITSI_BASE_URL to http://localhost:8080; setup_jitsi.sh line 78 waits for service at http://localhost:8080; docker-compose.yml line 6 exposes port 8080 mapped to container port 80; docker-compose.yml line 25 sets PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080

privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic benchmark where agents use a locally-hosted Jitsi Meet instance deployed via Docker (stable-9753 images) at http://localhost:8080. The agent must: (1) join the room 'HR_Interview_Confidential' in Firefox as 'Interviewer', (2) enable Lobby Mode from Security settings, (3) have a second participant join via Epiphany browser as 'Jane_Doe_Candidate', and (4) admit the guest. The Jitsi deployment includes web service (port 8080), XMPP server (Prosody), conference focus (Jicofo), and video bridge (JVB) components, all configured with ENABLE_LOBBY=1. Verification checks for: both browsers running, presence of room in server logs, and VLM confirmation of two participants in final state with guest admitted. All metadata values are correct and internally consistent except guest_name_alt which is not referenced or used.
